ddls:
CREATE TABLE "translation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "language_pair" INTEGER /* ID of the language pair */,
  "final_default" REAL /* Quality score for the 'final' translation strategy */,
  "final_and" REAL /* Quality score for the 'final-and' translation strategy */,
  "grow_diag" REAL /* Quality score for the 'grow-diag' translation strategy */,
  "grow" REAL /* Quality score for the 'grow' translation strategy */,
  "intersect" REAL /* Quality score for the 'intersect' translation strategy */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "engine_version" TEXT /* Version of the translation engine used */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific test that generated these metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES translation_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_metrics_language_pair FOREIGN KEY ("language_pair") REFERENCES language_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language pair */,
  "source_language" TEXT /* Source language of the translation */,
  "target_language" TEXT /* Target language of the translation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the translation strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the translation strategy */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the strategy is the default for the language pair */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_engine_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine version */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the translation engine */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the engine */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the engine version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the engine version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation test */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation engine version used */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language pair used in the test */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry for the test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the translation test was performed */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_tests_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES translation_engine_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_tests_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES language_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_tests_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES translation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES translation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., quality, performance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "is_downloaded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "source_text" TEXT /* Original text to be translated */,
  "translated_text" TEXT /* Translated text resulting from the translation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation engine version used */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language pair used for the translation */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation test this translation is part of */,
  "translation_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the specific translation */,
  "translation_status" TEXT /* Status of the translation (e.g., complete, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES language_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES translation_engine_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES translation_tests ("test_id")
)
